content.text: The job can't create pods due to the missing service account. Let me examine the job spec and the Role.

input.command: kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -E 'image:|serviceAccountName:|memory:' ; echo "---ROLE---"; kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -A10 'rules:'; echo "---SA---"; kubectl get sa -n spark-pi 2>&1; echo "---FILE---"; ls cases/spark/deploy_spark_pi/resource/ 2>&1; find / -name 'spark-pi-job.yaml' 2>/dev/null

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512"
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

content.text: Now I'll fix the YAML file, patch the Role, delete the failed job, and re-apply.

input.old_string:
serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
input.new_string:
serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3

        app: spark-pi

      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit

          echo "=============================================="

            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512"

kubectl patch role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi --type=json -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/rules/0/resources/-", "value": "pods"}]' 2>&1
echo "---DELETE---"
kubectl delete job spark-pi -n spark-pi 2>&1
echo "---APPLY---"
kubectl apply -f /mydata/karma/cases/spark/deploy_spark_pi/resource/spark-pi-job.yaml 2>&1

content.text: Now let me wait for the job to complete and verify.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  status=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$status" = "1" ]; then echo "JOB SUCCEEDED"; break; fi
  failed=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$failed" = "1" ]; then echo "JOB FAILED"; break; fi
  sleep 5
done
echo "---JOB---"; kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi 2>&1
echo "---PODS---"; kubectl get pods -n spark-pi -l app=spark-pi 2>&1
echo "---LOG (Pi line)---"; kubectl logs -n spark-pi -l app=spark-pi 2>&1 | grep -i "Pi is"

until [ "$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ] || [ "$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; do sleep 3; done
